goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'chinese' food and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'attraction type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve chinese food and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should be in the centre
Make sure you get address and phone number
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the restaurant
Make sure you get address and attraction type
